ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the game is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed, postponed) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport played in the league */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current champion team of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds" (
  "odd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odd */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the odd belongs to */,
  "home_odd" REAL /* Odd for the home team */,
  "away_odd" REAL /* Odd for the away team */,
  "over_odd" REAL /* Over odd for the game */,
  "under_odd" REAL /* Under odd for the game */,
  "bookmaker" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker providing the odds */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the odds were last updated */,
  "spread_home" REAL /* Spread for the home team */,
  "spread_away" REAL /* Spread for the away team */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points line for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the score belongs to */,
  "V_ML" INTEGER /* Vehicle margin line */,
  "H_ML" INTEGER /* Home margin line */,
  "V_Score" INTEGER /* Vehicle score */,
  "H_Score" INTEGER /* Home score */,
  "Result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "quarter_scores" TEXT /* JSON array to store scores for each quarter (or period) of the game */,
  "overtime_scores" TEXT /* JSON array to store scores for any overtime periods */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* JSON object to store the final score of the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scores were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, subscriber) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team subscribed to */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league subscribed to */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport subscribed to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription ends */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Renewal status of the subscription */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the subscription */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the prediction belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the prediction */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction made by the user (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "predicted_score_home" INTEGER /* Predicted score for the home team */,
  "predicted_score_away" INTEGER /* Predicted score for the away team */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the prediction was correct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game accessed */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team accessed */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
